name: Language switch mid-conversation — Spanish to English
expected_behavior: First turn: responds in Spanish about restaurants. Second turn: switches to English naturally without commenting on the language change. Provides steakhouse information in English.
expected_behavioral_quality: Follows the guest's language switch naturally. When guest starts in Spanish then switches to English, agent follows and responds in English. No awkward language mixing or commenting on the switch.

turns.user_message: Hola, me gustaria saber sobre los restaurantes
turns.agent_response:
Bienvenido a Mohegan Sun. Tenemos una gran variedad de opciones para cada momento del día, con más de 40 restaurantes y bares en todo el resort.

Dado que son casi las 11:30 de la mañana, te sugiero considerar **Hash House A Go Go** en el Casino of the Earth si buscas algo sustancioso; son famosos por sus porciones generosas de comida casera, pero ten en cuenta que cierran a las 2:00 PM. Si prefieres un ambiente más animado con sabores auténticos, **SolToro Taqueria** acaba de abrir y ofrece excelentes tacos y una selección de tequilas de primer nivel.

Después de almorzar, muchos de nuestros huéspedes disfrutan caminar por las tiendas de The Shops at Mohegan Sun para bajar la comida. ¿Tienes algún tipo de cocina específica en mente o buscas algo para una ocasión especial?

turns.user_message: Actually, can you tell me about the steakhouse in English?
turns.agent_response:
Michael Jordan's Steak House is our premier choice for a classic steakhouse experience, featuring USDA Prime cuts and an atmosphere filled with iconic sports memorabilia in the Casino of the Sky. The dining room feels elevated and sophisticated, making it the perfect spot if you are looking for a high-end meal.

They open today at 5:00 PM and serve until 10:00 PM, and since it is a very popular destination, I highly recommend a reservation and business casual attire. While the steaks are the star, their garlic bread with Gorgonzola fondue is a legendary starter that many guests consider a must-order.

I can certainly connect you with our host team to finalize a booking for this evening if that sounds like the right fit. After a steak dinner, many of our guests enjoy heading over to the Wolf Den for some free live music. Are you planning a dinner for a special occasion or just looking for the best ribeye on the property?
